creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
To submitter: please note that we dropped sparc64 support some months ago in -CURRENT, as it finally fell below the threshhold where people were willing to keep it going.

For instance, all of my own machines (where I used to work on package building) have been shut down for over a year now.

You may find that you are on your own in this case.  Sorry.
